pageContext.name: Stormtrooper
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom present the Stormtrooper Egg Attack EAA-164 Action Figure!  The next entry in the Egg Attack series brings one of the most indispensable villains from the Star Wars franchise: the iconic Stormtrooper. This 6' Star Wars figure features unique armor aging effects for a faithful reproduction of the Stormtrooper, the head, neck, wrists and knees have been reworked to adhere to new character models.  The Stormtrooper collectible also comes fully equipped with weapon accessories!
